name: awiki-dashboard
description: A-Wiki Live Dashboard — esbuild build pipeline (v8) + Playwright tests (v10) + Backup (v11) + Theme/Mobile (v12) + Onboarding (v13) + Visualizations (v14) + Event Log/Chat (v15) + Integration Audit (v16) + Pure Minimal redesign (v17). Bundles src/*.js into a single minified app.min.js served by server.py.
